query: What are the docket numbers for the filings Google submitted to FERC between June and December 2024? Use your FERC docket tool
final_answer:
Based on the FERC eLibrary search for filings by Google between June and December 2024, here are the docket numbers, organized by filing date:

## Google Filings at FERC (June – December 2024)

| Date | Filing | Docket Number(s) | Filer |
|---|---|---|---|
| **06/28/2024** | Triennial Market Power Analysis for Central Region | **ER10-468-005** | Google Energy LLC |
| **09/19/2024** | Motion to Intervene (doc-less) | **ER24-2891-000**, **ER24-2888-000**, **ER24-2890-000**, **ER24-2893-000**, **ER24-2894-000**, **ER24-2889-000** | Google LLC |
| **11/05/2024** | Supplement to Notice of Change in Status (1/31/2024 filing) | **ER10-2835-011** | Google Energy LLC |
| **12/10/2024** | Post-Technical Conference Comments | **AD24-11-000** | Google LLC |
| **12/27/2024** | Triennial Market Power Analysis for SPP Region | **ER10-2835-012** | Google Energy LLC |

### Summary of Distinct Dockets
- **AD24-11-000** — Rulemaking (Electric)
- **ER10-468-005** — Google Energy LLC market-based rate authorization (Central region)
- **ER10-2835-011** & **ER10-2835-012** — Google Energy LLC market-based rate authorization (SPP region)
- **ER24-2888-000, ER24-2889-000, ER24-2890-000, ER24-2891-000, ER24-2893-000, ER24-2894-000** — Group intervention filing

### Notes
- Two Google entities appear in the results: **Google LLC** (parent) and **Google Energy LLC** (the FERC-jurisdictional power marketer subsidiary represented by Perkins Coie LLP).
- The September 19, 2024 filing is a single Motion to Intervene submitted across six related dockets.
- Data source: FERC eLibrary AdvancedSearch API, retrieved 2026-06-14 (saved to `/work/ferc_search_20260614_195458.csv`).

steps.reasoning: The user wants me to find Google filings at FERC between June and December 2024. I'll use the search_ferc_dockets tool with Google as the affiliation.
